title: PRMP vs SAGEConv Benchmark on RelBench rel-hm Tasks
summary: Interactive notebook demonstrating Predictive Residual Message Passing (PRMP) benchmarked against standard HeteroSAGEConv on RelBench rel-hm tasks (user-churn classification via AUROC, item-sales regression via MAE). Compares three model variants — standard SAGEConv baseline, PRMP with learned predictions, and PRMP with random frozen predictions — across multiple seeds. The mini data JSON contains curated per-instance predictions and run summaries for reproducible analysis.
